item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 clearly wakes up to the repeated local-patch pattern and brakes adding a fourth permanent entry-page notice, while allowing only a bounded temporary stopgap. Turn 2 keeps that brake active under pressure: it permits the launch as an emergency条, marks it temporary/one-time, says it should not become the new normal or invite more scattered prompts, and sets a structural consolidation deadline by Friday close of business."}
